creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, with minor changes. Thanks! Notably, I dropped the 
self-conflict and filed a patch against Mk/bsd.port.mk as 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=161287 that would fix the 
"does not detect older installed version" problem system-wide.
